hero.title: Trusted
hero.subtitle: PT Palm Trade Company exports premium coconuts from Indonesia to Thailand, China, and India markets with international standards.

about.title: Your Coconut Export Partner from Indonesia
about.description1: PT Palm Trade Company is an Indonesian coconut exporter specializing in semi husked coconut supply for international markets including Thailand, China, and India.
about.description2: We work closely with farmer communities and apply structured quality control to ensure export-grade products in every shipment.
about.description3: Our goal is to deliver dependable quality, transparent communication, and smooth export processes for our global buyers.

products.title: Semi Husked Coconut Specifications
products.subtitle: We provide export-grade semi husked coconut for Thailand, China, and India markets with consistent quality and stable capacity.

gallery.title: Product & Process Photos
gallery.subtitle: Explore our gallery featuring semi husked coconut products, sorting process, packaging, and export preparation.

news.title: Latest News & Updates
news.subtitle: Stay updated with the latest insights on coconut export from Indonesia and global market developments.

team.title: Meet Our Professional Team
team.subtitle: Our experienced team is ready to assist with your coconut export needs.
